# Pull Request Checklist

Thanks for contributing! Please complete the following before merging:

- [ ] I have validated my changes: `node scripts/validate.js`
- [ ] I have regenerated the README: `node scripts/generate-readme.js`
- [ ] I have added or updated the resource only in `data/resources.json` (the README is auto-generated)
- [ ] I have checked for duplicate URLs and names
- [ ] My resource links to an official government or public-interest source

> **Note:** The CI pipeline runs `validate.js` automatically. Make sure it passes before requesting review.
